programmes.show_description: Everyone associated with an emerald brooch keeps dying. When the brooch comes into Cordelia's possession, she must uncover the truth behind its curse before she's next to die.
Steed is warned about his own personal safety by a psychic medium whilst investigating the death of his friend. Steed's concerns grow further when her predictions start to become a reality .
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.
Western starring John Wayne, Maureen O'Hara and Patrick Wayne. A wealthy rancher must navigate warring factions in the Wild West while also fighting to save his troubled marriage. (1963)

Hollister investigates when $30,000 in payroll money is stolen from the Army officer.
Hired killers have the run of the town after the end of a bloody range war, but one rancher whose son was killed wants revenge.
Embittered over the loss of his home and grandson in a fire during a bandit raid, Casement vows to track down the men responsible.
Steed believes he has finally cracked a case when he captures his nemesis. But when things go awry, the team and a member of the royal family suddenly find themselves in grave danger .
Fears mount when a British official's vivid dream about his impending death comes true. Can The Avengers keep his successor safe when he starts to have similar dreams about his own demise?
Mannering and Cordelia investigate a neo-Nazi organization who are selling off art treasures to fund their evil plans to gain dominance in Europe. Stopping them will prove to be a challenge.

A reporter comes from New York to Tombstone to write a story about the town too tough to die.
Hollister tracks a man who murdered an old miner and stole the man's gold.
Victoria and Mano's grief is compounded when they learn their late father left his estate to a surprise heir.
The team are tasked with investigating the whereabouts of a stolen rocket from a munitions warehouse. Meanwhile, Purdey experiences a tense encounter with her ex-boyfriend .
The Avengers find themselves in danger when they are targeted by a relative of one of their past adversaries. Can Peel and Steed outwit the mastermind determined to exact their revenge?
When Mannering discovers the Russian icons he had sold in good faith to a gallery have been replaced by fakes, he must play the thief at his own game at a rigged poker table to recover them.
